title: Trump tells Axios he no longer views Anthropic as national security threat
description: June 19 (Reuters) - U.S. President ⁠Donald Trump said he might have viewed artificial intelligence company ⁠Anthropic as a national security threat last week, but he ‌no longer does, according to an interview with "The Axios Show" published on Friday.

title: Maharashtra Signs Pact With Google To Train Over 4 Lakh Teachers In AI And Digital Skills Free Of Cost
description: In Mumbai, the Maharashtra School Education Department has signed a Letter of Intent with Google for Education to train over four lakh teachers in Artificial Intelligence and digital skills through the ‘Google AI Educator Series’. The 18-month programme aims to enhance AI literacy and modern teaching methods across government and aided schools without financial burden on the state.

title: winning AI researcher John Jumper leaves Google DeepMind for Anthropic
description: The battle for elite AI talent just claimed another major name. John Jumper, the Nobel Prize-winning researcher behind AlphaFold, announced Friday that he is leaving Google DeepMind after nearly nine years to join AI startup Anthropic. title: powered governance to improve traffic, public services
description: Delhi’s administration is preparing to place artificial intelligence (AI) at the centre of urban governance, with Lieutenant-Governor Sardar TS Sandhu on Thursday indicating that the technology could soon be used across sectors ranging from traffic management and environmental monitoring to infrastructure maintenance and grievance redressal.

title: Abu Dhabi's MGX weighs multi-billion deal for data center operator DayOne, sources say
